assignments.name: Assign_award_baseline_fields_to_item
assignments.label: Assign award baseline fields to item

assignments.name: Assign_initial_items_to_remove_award_item
assignments.label: Assign initial items to remove award item

assignments.name: set_need_FY_Changes_to_false
assignments.label: set need FY Changes to false

assignments.name: set_need_FY_changes_to_true
assignments.label: set need FY changes to true

choices.name: chc_Baseline_Measure_Details
choices.choiceText: Approved Phase Measures - this includes approved Phase Request measures information

choices.name: chc_Ending_EPC
choices.choiceText: Approved Phase Homes Ending EPC - this includes number of homes within approved Phase Requests ending EPC fields

choices.name: chc_Financial_Year_Spends
choices.choiceText: Financial Year Spend - this includes grant and co-funding spend per FY

choices.name: chc_House_Count
choices.choiceText: Total Project Homes - this includes total number of homes to be upgraded, total number of homes to reach EPC C and total number of homes accessing each LCH offer

choices.name: chc_Monetary
choices.choiceText: Project and Approved Phase Costs - this includes total project grant, co-funding, capital and A&A costs; and approved Phase Request grant, co-funding, capital and A&A costs.

choices.name: chc_Starting_EPC
choices.choiceText: Approved Phase Homes Starting EPC - this includes number of homes within approved Phase Requests starting EPC fields

collectionProcessors.name: filter_award_baseline_from_initial_baselines
collectionProcessors.label: filter award baseline from initial baselines

decisions.name: check_award_baseline_item_Already_exist
decisions.label: check award baseline item Already exist

decisions.name: Does_Monetary_Totals_FY_Totals_Check
decisions.label: Does Monetary Totals = FY Totals Check

decisions.name: FY_Grant_Spend_Baseline_Grant_Spend_Check
decisions.label: FY Grant Spend = Baseline Grant Spend Check

decisions.name: has_existing_baseline_change_line_items
decisions.label: has existing baseline change line items

Flow.description: Flow to handle the Challenge Fund baseline changes of a change control request
Flow.interviewLabel: GMS - Change Control Request Form - SP Baselines {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: GMS - Change Control Request Form - CF Baselines

recordCreates.name: Create_new_updated_change_line_items
recordCreates.label: Create new updated change line items

recordDeletes.name: Delete_the_existing_baseline_change_line_items
recordDeletes.label: Delete the existing baseline change line items

recordLookups.name: Get_all_Change_Control_Line_Items
recordLookups.label: Get all Change Control Line Items

fields.name: CancelConfirmationText
fields.fieldText: Cancelling will delete all current changes to the Award level Baseline

fields.name: GuidanceFYSpends
fields.fieldText:
Financial Year Spend 

Please indicate below any change to your grant or co-funding spend per financial year (FY). 

 

Total grant funding spend across all FYs must equal the total project grant amount in your Award Baseline. Total co-funding spend across all FYs must equal the total project co-funding amount in your Award Baseline. These amounts can be seen below in the 'Total Grant Spend' and 'Total Co-funding Spend' fields.  

 

If you wish to request a change to your total project grant or co-funding figures, please do so by completing the 'Project Costs' section on the previous page.

fields.name: MonetaryError
fields.fieldText: Error - The monetary values you’ve entered do not match the Award Baseline total. Please update the figures below to accurately reflect your request.

fields.name: doesntEqualDisplaytitle
fields.fieldText: Error - Your proposed Spend totals does not equal the baseline Spend. Please review your figures. If you want to change the totals, use the monetary option.﻿

fields.name: Spend_Error_Message
fields.fieldText:
Please ensure you match the following figures


Total Grant Spend:

{!flaAwardTotalGrantSpend}


Total Co Funding Spend:

{!flaAwardTotalCoFundingSpend}

fields.name: Grant_Funding_Spend_By_Financial_Year
fields.fieldText: Grant Funding Spend By Financial Year

screens.name: BaselineChangeType
screens.label: Project and Approved Phase Request Baselines
